prompt: TDD a Contact.active scope: archived_at is nil and account matches. Write spec first, then implementation.

assertions.text: Writes the failing spec BEFORE writing the implementation
Scope test includes a non-matching record (archived contact) to prove exclusion
Scope test includes a cross-account contact to prove account scoping
Uses contain_exactly or equivalent (not just include, which can't prove exclusion)
Scaffolds the empty scope method before the first test run (avoiding NameError red)
